positioning.oneLiner: WIDA PRIME helps users understand how instructional materials align with WIDA language development standards and frameworks.
positioning.summary: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal. Source language distinguishes PRIME V1, PRIME V2, PRIME V2 Español, and PRIME 2020, and emphasizes alignment information for instructional materials rather than endorsement or effectiveness claims.
corePillars: PRIME V1 and PRIME V2 correlations

audiences.name: publishers and correlators
needs: Avoid unsupported endorsement or effectiveness claims
approvedMessages: WIDA PRIME lists instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.
PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
WIDA PRIME information helps educators consider how particular materials fit in their program.

audiences.name: education leaders
needs: Find instructional materials with PRIME correlation or alignment information
Use PRIME documents appropriately without treating them as endorsements
approvedMessages: WIDA PRIME provides information about reviewed PRIME v1 and v2 correlations and PRIME 2020 alignments.
PRIME V2 Español includes materials correlated with the WIDA Spanish Language Development Standards, 2013 Edition.
WIDA does not endorse any set of instructional materials, and WIDA PRIME is not an evaluative tool that judges effectiveness.

proofPoints: The WIDA PRIME site lists reviewed PRIME v1 and v2 correlations and PRIME 2020 alignments.
The WIDA PRIME site says PRIME 2020 includes materials aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.
The WIDA PRIME site says WIDA does not endorse instructional materials and PRIME is not an evaluative tool that judges effectiveness.
The WIDA Workshops site says WCEPS is the sole source provider of WIDA Professional Learning Licensed Workshops and Webinars sold to school districts.
approvedPhrases: reviewed PRIME v1 and v2 correlations
WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition
consider how particular materials fit in their program
restrictedClaims: Do not imply WIDA endorses any set of instructional materials.
Do not describe WIDA PRIME as an effectiveness evaluation.
Do not claim the PRIME seal guarantees student outcomes.
Do not invent pricing or certification claims.

html-email-announcement.priority: invite users to view materials or contact WIDA PRIME

landing-page.priority: summarize PRIME process and materials listing

sourceEvidence.label: Instructional materials listing
sourceEvidence.excerpt: WIDA is pleased to list instructional materials that have gone through the PRIME process and received a PRIME seal.

sourceEvidence.label: PRIME versions
sourceEvidence.excerpt: Users may filter for correlations previously correlated with PRIME V1 and PRIME V2, or aligned with PRIME 2020.

sourceEvidence.label: PRIME 2020
sourceEvidence.excerpt: PRIME 2020 includes materials that are aligned to the current WIDA English Language Development Standards Framework, 2020 Edition.

sourceEvidence.label: Endorsement guardrail
sourceEvidence.excerpt: WIDA does not endorse any set of instructional materials. WIDA PRIME is not an evaluative tool that judges the effectiveness of published materials.
